name: cortex-plugin-figma
description: Read Figma designs, extract tokens, generate code
author: CortexPrism

tools.name: figma_get_file
tools.description: Get a Figma file by key

params.name: file_key
params.description: Figma file key from the URL

tools.name: figma_extract_tokens
tools.description: Extract design tokens from a Figma node

params.name: file_key
params.description: Figma file key from the URL

params.name: node_id
params.description: Node ID to extract tokens from

tools.name: figma_generate_code
tools.description: Generate frontend code from a Figma design

params.name: file_key
params.description: Figma file key from the URL

params.name: node_id
params.description: Node ID to generate code from

tools.name: figma_list_components
tools.description: List components in a Figma file

params.name: file_key
params.description: Figma file key from the URL

tools.name: figma_get_styles
tools.description: Get text, color, and effect styles from a Figma file

params.name: file_key
params.description: Figma file key from the URL

fields.label: Figma Personal Access Token
fields.description: Figma personal access token for API authentication
